verses.text: Tua khit ciangin, Jerusalem khua-ah Jew mite biakna pawi kibawl ahih manin Jesuh zong a pai hi
Jerusalem khuasung Tuu Kongpi a kici gei-ah Hebru pau-in Bethzatha a kici bual khat om a, tua bual kimkotah talap nga a om hi
Hih talapte sungah a mittaw, a khebai, khutlekhezaw, cina tampi lum phengphang uh hi. (Amaute in tua bualtui a kilawh ding ngakin a om uh ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' vantung mi khat in tua bual tui lok thei zel a, tui a kilawh khit ciangin tua lai a tung masa penpen ama natna panin a dam hi
Tua talapte sung khatah kum sawmthum leh kum giat sung a cina khin mi khat a om hi
Jesuh in tua cinapa mu a, tua munah sauveipi a lupkhitna a theih ciangin ama kiangah, “Na dam nuam hiam?” ci-in a dot leh
cinapa in, “Sia aw, bualtui a kilawh ciangin kei hong pua ding kuamah omlo ahih manin, kei ka tun' ma-in midang khat a bual sung na tungkhin pahpah hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tho in la, na lupna pheek pua-in pai in,” a cih ciangin
tua cinapa thakhatin dampah a, a lupna pheek la-in a paipah hi. Tua ni pen Sabbath ni hi citciat ahih manin
Jerusalem khuasunga om Jew mi uliante in cina damkikpa kiangah, “Tuni pen Sabbath ni ahih manin lupna pheek na puak ding ngeina hilo hi,” a cih uh ciangin
amah in, “Kei hong damsakpa in, ‘Na lupna pheek la in la pai in,’ hong ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin amaute in, “‘Na lupna pheek la in la pai in,’ hong ci kua ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Ahi zongin tua munah mi tampi om a, Jesuh paikhia ziau ahih manin cina damkikpa in amah a damsak kua ahi hiam, cih a thei kei hi
Tua khit ciangin Jesuh in biakinn sungah tua cina dampa mukik a, ama kiangah, “Tu-in na dam khinta hi. Mawhna bawl nawn kei in. Tua hi kei leh a siazaw khat na thuak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah zong pusuak a, Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante kiangah, “Keimah hong damsakpa pen Jesuh ahi hi,” ci-in a va ko hi
Tua ahih manin Jesuh in Sabbath ni-in cina a damsakna hangin amaute in Jesuh bawlsiat ding a kipan uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Ka Pa in tuni dongin na sem tawntung ahih manin kei zong ka sep ding mah ahi hi,” a ci hi

Hih bangin ama kampauna hangin amaute in Jesuh thatnuam semsem uh hi. Amah in Sabbath thukham a palsat bek hiloin, Pasian nangawn ka Pa ci ahih manin Pasian tawh a kikimin kiseh hi, ci-in a mawhsak uh hi.

Tua ahih manin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “A mantakin gen lehang: Tapa in ama thu bek tawh bangmah semlo a, a Pa in a sep a muhteng bek a sem ahi hi. Tua hi a, a Pa in a septeng mah a Tapa in zong a sem ahi hi
Pa in a Tapa itin, ama septeng mah lak a, mailam hunah zong hih sangin a lianzaw a sep ding lak lai ding ahih manin lamdang na sa mahmah ding uh hi
Pa in mi sisate nangawn thosakin a nuntaksak mah bangin Tapa in zong a ut peuhpeuh nungtasak thei hi

Pa in kuama tungah thukhen nasep semlo hi. Mi khempeuh in Pa a zahtak mah bangin Tapa a zahtak theihna dingun Pa in thukhen nasep khempeuh a Tapa tungah a pia hi. Tua ahih manin Tapa a zahtaklo mi khempeuh pen Tapa a sawl Pa Pasian zong a zahtaklo ahi uh hi
“A mantakin kong genin-ah: Ka thugennate za-in kei hong sawlpa a um khempeuh a nungta paisuak ding hita hi. Mawhsak thukhenna ngah nawnloin, sihna panin a hingkik ta ahi hi
A taktakin ci lehang: A si mite in Pasian' Tapa' aw a zak hun uh hong tung ding hi bek loin tu-in a hun hong tungkhin hita a, ama aw a za mi khempeuh nungta ding uh hi
Pa in nuntakna a piaktheih mah bangin Tapa in zong a piaktheihna dingin Pa in a bawl hi
Amah pen Mihing Tapa ahih manin thu khentheihna ding aana ama tungah a pia hi
Hih thu ka hong gen ciangin lamdangsa kei un. Han sungah a om misi khempeuh in ama aw za-in

han sung panin a hong paikhiat uh hun hong tung ding hi. A gamtat hoih mite pen a nungta tawntung dingin hong thokik ding uh a, a gamtat siate ahih leh mawhsak thukhenna a thuak dingin hong thokik ding uh hi.
“Keima thu guak tawh ka hihtheih bangmah omlo hi. Pasian' hong genna bang bekin thu ka khen hi. Keima ut bangin semloin kei hong sawlpa' deih bangin sem ka hih manin ka thukhenna thuman hi
“Keima thu tawh kisai-ah keimahmah in teci pang leng kuamah in a thumanin sang theilo ding hi
Tua ahih manin keima-a' ding teci a pangding mi khat om a, keima thu genin teci a pan'na thuman hi, ci-in ka thei hi
Note in Johan kiangah thu a dong dingin mi na sawl uh a, amah in note kiangah a thuman hong genzo hi
Keimah in mihingte' teci pan'na a kisam ka hi kei a, note in hotkhiatna na ngahtheihna dingun note-a' ding ngaihsutna tawh hih thuteng a hong gen ka hizaw hi
Johan pen meivak bangin kuangin a taang hi a, ama khuavak sungah tawlkhat nuamsa-in omding na ut uh hi

Ahi zongin Johan' teci pan'na sangin a lianzaw teci khat ka nei a, tua in: Ka Pa in sepdingin a hong piak tu-a ka sep thute in kei-a' dingin teci a pang hi a, Pa in kei a hong sawl taktak ahihna hong kilangsak hi

Tua ban panin kei a hong sawl Pasian in zong keima-a' dingin teci a pang hi. Note in Pasian' sawlpa' thu umlo na hih manun Pasian' aw lah za ngeilo, a maitang lah mu ngeilo, na lungsim uhah zong ama thu a ciinglo na hi uh hi
Nuntak tawntung ngahtheihna ding lametna tawh Lai Siangtho sung na lim sim mahmah uh a, tua na sim uh Lai Siangtho in keima thu mah genin teci pang napi-in
na nuntak theihna dingun kei kiangah nong painuam kei veve uh hi
“Hih bangin kong gen ciangin mihingte in hong pahtak ding ka deihna hilo a
note' lungsim sungah Pasian itna na neih hetlohna uh ka theihna hang hizaw hi
Ka Pa' thu tawh kei hong pai napi-in na hong sangnuam kei uh hi. Tua hinapi-in midang khatpeuh ama thu tawh hong paitawm leh na sang ding uh hi
Pasian' pahtak theihna ding hanciam nuamloin, note khatlekhat na kiphat theihna ding uh a hanciam mite' thugen, a bang hangin um zawsop na hi uh hiam
Hih bangin ka hong gen ciangin ka Pa kiangah note a hong mawhsak dingpa hi, ci-in hong ngaihsun kei un la, note in suan' belin na neih uh Moses pen a hong mawhsak dingpa ahih zawkna thu thei ta un
Moses in keima thu gen belin nei ahih manin Moses um taktak hi le uh cin kei zong na hong um ding uh hi
Ahi zongin Moses' laigelh thute umlo na hih manun kei hong bangci uptheih mah ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi.
